title: PvP mods with optimization (vulkan)
description: A lightweight PvP-focused Fabric modpack that enhances combat performance, reduces lag, and improves visuals. Perfect for smooth multiplayer duels and crystal PvP.
body:
To highlight the technical advantage of using the Vulkan API, I’ve refined the performance section and added a specific note about the rendering engine. This makes it clear that the pack uses a modern alternative to OpenGL.

PvP Mods with Optimization
PvP Mods with Optimization is a performance-driven Fabric modpack engineered for players who demand fast-paced, high-stakes combat. We’ve merged essential tactical utilities with elite optimization mods to deliver buttery-smooth gameplay, ultra-low latency, and enhanced visual clarity—giving you the ultimate advantage in duels, crystal PvP, and competitive servers.

### ⚔️ Key Features

The Tactical Edge: Track critical fight data in real-time with Health Indicators, TotemCounter, Sprint Indicator, and Combat Hitboxes.

Vulkan Rendering Engine: Experience a revolutionary performance boost. By utilizing the VulkanMod rendering engine instead of standard OpenGL, this pack optimizes GPU usage for significantly higher FPS and more stable frame times.

Maximum Framerates: Say goodbye to stutter. Powered by a heavy-hitting, next-gen optimization stack including VulkanMod, Lithium, and FerriteCore for sky-high FPS and minimal lag.

Clean & Immersive Visuals: Look good while winning. Featuring Iris Shaders, Blur+, Chat Heads, and Wavey Capes for a sleek, modern, and distraction-free experience.

Seamless Quality of Life: Navigate effortlessly with Zoomify, Freelook, In-Game Account Switcher, and Mod Menu, making your setup and gameplay smoother than ever.

### ⚙️ Requirements

Version: Minecraft 1.21.1+ (Fully compatible up to the latest release)

Modloader: Fabric

Hardware: Ensure your GPU drivers are up to date to support Vulkan rendering.

Compatibility: 100% Client-Side (Use it on any vanilla or competitive server!)

### 💡 Important Notes

Optimized for Modern Systems: By using the Vulkan API, this pack bypasses many of the performance bottlenecks found in traditional Minecraft versions.

Pure Performance: Tailor-made for multiplayer PvP, but fully functional for a highly optimized singleplayer experience.

Stability: To keep the pack stable and optimized, avoid adding third-party mods that alter core combat mechanics.
